backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Nellore Print Hub backend, defining all data types (quotations, projects, reviews, customers, chat, admin) and including storage and authorization mixins for a full-featured printing business management system.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (customer self-service portal, bilingual text display, services redesign) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary catalog describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file, used as build planning reference documentation.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart colors, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Nellore Print Hub', mounting the app at the `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that configures TanStack Router with all routes (public, admin, and customer portal), wraps the app in CustomerAuthProvider, and conditionally shows a ProfileSetup modal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that restricts access to admin pages by checking Internet Identity authentication and admin status, showing appropriate UI for loading, access denied, first-admin registration, or unauthenticated states.
frontend/src/components/BilingualText.ts: Reusable component that renders English and Telugu text together, either stacked vertically (default) or inline side-by-side with a separator, supporting per-language className overrides.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Mobile bottom navigation bar with links to main app routes (Home, Services, Gallery, Reviews, Contact) and a chat button, with lock indicators for unauthenticated users and i18n support.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: A mobile-friendly bottom sheet modal component that slides up from the bottom, locks body scroll when open, and supports an optional title with a close button.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: A form select component that opens a BottomSheet with a list of options, showing a checkmark on the selected item and triggering haptic feedback on selection.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A floating chat widget that allows authenticated users to send and view messages, displaying a login prompt for unauthenticated users and supporting i18n.
frontend/src/components/CustomerGuard.ts: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated customers to the login page and renders children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A button component that toggles the app language between English and Telugu with haptic feedback.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout wrapping all pages with a sticky header (logo, language toggle, admin access), footer, bottom navigation, and chat widget.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing loading state and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-style history of negotiation messages between a customer and admin, with distinct styling for each sender.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog form for new users to set up their profile (name, email, mobile) with validation, haptic feedback, and i18n support.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetailMod: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a project, including its image, title, category badge, description, and completion date, with bilingual (English/Telugu) support.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A wrapper component that adds pull-to-refresh functionality to its children using touch events, showing a spinner indicator during pull and refresh states.
frontend/src/components/ShareAppButton.t: A button component that triggers the native Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy to share the app URL, with bilingual label support.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A skeleton loading placeholder component that renders animated shimmer cards in four variants: project, review, quotation, and a default service layout.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: A wrapper component that enables horizontal swipe-based navigation by translating its children along the X-axis in response to touch gestures.
frontend/src/contexts/CustomerAuthContex: A React context that manages customer authentication state, persisting session data (customerId and identifier) to localStorage with login and logout methods.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: A React context that manages the app's active language ('en' or 'te'), persisting the selection to localStorage and providing toggle and set methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: A hook that queries the backend to determine whether the currently authenticated Internet Identity caller has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: A hook that exposes a mutation for verifying admin credentials by SHA-256 hashing the password and calling the backend's verifyAuthentication method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminContent.ts: Provides hooks for fetching and updating the admin-managed site content (contact info, services, hours, gallery, etc.) via React Query mutations and queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExists.ts: A hook that checks whether any admin user has been registered by querying the backend admin user count.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Provides hooks for listing existing admin invitations and inviting a new admin user by hashing their password before sending it to the backend.
Provides two mutations: one to register the first admin via Internet Identity principal, and another to seed the first admin's email/password credentials when no admin exists.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides two React Query mutation hooks for biometric authentication: `useBiometricLogin` for authenticating via WebAuthn and `useRegisterBiometric` for registering a new biometric credential, both calling the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Exports React Query hooks for chat functionality including sending messages, fetching all messages, owner replies, and retrieving chat history for a specific customer.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides hooks to fetch (`useGetCompanyLogo`) and update (`useSetCompanyLogo`) the company logo via the backend actor, with query cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: Provides hooks to fetch (`useGetContactInfo`) and update (`useUpdateContactInfo`) contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerQuotations: Exports a single React Query hook `useGetCustomerQuotations` that fetches all quotation requests for a given customer ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides hooks for fetching delivery configuration, calculating delivery fees by distance, and updating delivery config (per-km rate and minimum fee) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Exports a single mutation hook `useRespondToNegotiation` that sends a negotiation response for a quotation and invalidates related query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides hooks to fetch (`useGetOfficeLocation`) and set (`useSetOfficeLocation`) the office location via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Exports React Query hooks for full CRUD operations on projects: fetching all or by category, adding, editing, and deleting projects via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements a pull-to-refresh gesture hook using touch events, tracking pull distance and refresh state, and triggering a provided async `onRefresh` callback when the threshold is exceeded.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationFile.ts: Exports `useGetQuotationFile`, a React Query hook that fetches all quotations and returns the file blob associated with a specific quotation ID.
Exports `useQuotationResponse`, a mutation hook that submits a status response (with optional message) for a quotation and invalidates related query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all quotation-related operations including fetching, creating, approving, and updating quotation status via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Exports `useQuotationStatistics`, a React Query hook that fetches aggregated quotation counts by status from the backend, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all reviews, filter reviews by rating, and add new reviews through the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceImages.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch, add, and delete service images via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Custom hook that enables horizontal touch-swipe navigation between a predefined set of page routes using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and save the current caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoClips.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch, add, and delete video clips via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light and dark mode CSS custom properties for a print-industry-themed design system, and adds utility classes for shimmer animations and mobile safe areas.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wraps the backend ExternalBlob type in a frontend class that exposes methods for getting bytes, direct URLs, upload progress tracking, and construction from URL or bytes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders a localized About page with a hero section, a grid of company benefit cards, and a commitment section using translations from the language context.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AboutContentMan: Admin page for editing and saving the About page's custom text content, loading existing content via useGetAdminContent and persisting changes with useUpdateAdminContent.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard displaying quotation status statistics as stat cards and a grid of navigation links to all admin management sections (quotations, projects, chat, users, etc.).
Admin login page supporting email/password, biometric (WebAuthn), and Internet Identity authentication, with auto-seeding of the first admin credentials when no admin exists.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRegistrati: Admin registration page with form validation for email and password fields, invoking the invite admin mutation and redirecting to login on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin user management page that lists existing admin users and provides a dialog form to invite new admin users with email and password.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BusinessHoursMa: Admin page for managing per-day business hours (open/close times or closed), loading existing hours from admin content and saving updates back to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Admin chat management page that groups customer messages by email, displays conversation threads, and allows admins to send replies to individual messages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContactInfoMana: Admin page for editing and saving contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) with bilingual (English/Telugu) labels, using admin content hooks and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DeliveryConfigM: Admin page for configuring delivery pricing (per-km rate and minimum fee in rupees), converting to/from paise for backend storage, with bilingual UI and save feedback.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HomepageContent: Admin page for editing and saving the homepage promotional/announcement text content, with a textarea input and bilingual English/Telugu labels.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Admin page for uploading and displaying the company logo, supporting image file selection with size validation, upload progress tracking, and blob storage integration.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Admin page for managing portfolio projects with full CRUD operations, supporting image uploads with progress tracking, and a dialog form for adding/editing project details including title, description, and service category.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for managing customer quotation requests, supporting status transitions (draft, pending, payment, work-in-progress, completed), negotiation replies with file attachments, and overdue quotation tracking with bilingual UI.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServiceMediaMan: Admin page for managing service media, allowing admins to add and delete service images and video clips organized by service type (digital, banner, offset, design) using tabbed UI.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUsPage.tsx: Renders a Contact Us page displaying email, phone, location cards, and business hours sourced from admin content, with bilingual English/Telugu labels.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerLogi: Customer login page that authenticates users via email/mobile and SHA-256-hashed password against the backend actor, then stores session via CustomerAuthContext and redirects to the portal.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerPort: Customer portal dashboard that displays the logged-in customer's quotations/orders with status badges and service type labels in both English and Telugu.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerRegi: Customer registration page that collects email, mobile, and password, hashes the password with SHA-256, calls the backend registerCustomer method, and redirects to login on success.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Displays delivery pricing information (per-km rate and minimum fee) fetched from the backend, and provides an interactive calculator where users can input a distance to estimate their delivery fee.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page showcasing Magic Hub Nellore's printing services with a hero section, feature highlights, sample images from the backend or static fallbacks, and optional admin-managed promo content.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Lists the authenticated customer's quotation requests with status badges, expandable detail sections showing price/description/terms/files, and an approve action for quotations awaiting customer review.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Displays a filterable masonry-layout gallery of completed projects fetched from the backend, with category filter buttons and an admin shortcut to the project management page.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: A post-submission confirmation page that shows a success state with the new quotation ID and a numbered list of next steps, with navigation buttons to view quotations or return home.
A form page allowing customers to submit a new print quotation by selecting a service type, deadline, project details, contact info, and an optional file attachment (up to 10MB) with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Displays a customer-facing page listing all their quotations as cards, each showing status, details, and actions (accept, reject, negotiate, approve price). Includes a NegotiationHistory component and dialogs for negotiation and approval confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Renders a services catalog page listing four printing/design service types (digital, banner, offset, design) with bilingual (English/Telugu) descriptions, features, and sample images fetched dynamically.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: Provides a form for customers to submit a review with name, rating, review text, project type, and optional image upload, then calls the addReview mutation and navigates to the testimonials page on success.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Shows a paginated, filterable grid of customer reviews with star-rating filters and a pull-to-refresh mechanism; redirects unauthenticated users to log in before viewing.
frontend/src/translations/en.ts: English translation strings for the entire frontend application, organized by feature sections such as common, nav, home, services, contact, gallery, and reviews.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Exports English and Telugu translation objects and a getTranslations helper function that returns the appropriate translation set based on the selected language.
frontend/src/translations/te.ts: Telugu language translation file implementing the full Translations interface with all UI strings for the printing business app, including navigation, home, services, contact, gallery, and reviews sections.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Haptic feedback utility using the browser Vibration API, providing tap, success, error, and selection vibration patterns via both an object interface and a convenience function.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: WebAuthn utility providing biometric authentication support checks, credential registration, authentication flows, and ArrayBuffer/Base64 conversion helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with oklch-based design tokens, custom fonts, border radii, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file describing the printing business app's architecture, existing features, known issues, and image requirements at schema version 1.0.0.
